title: Houthis Claim Strikes on 2 Saudi Oil Tankers in Red Sea
summary_full: The Saudi authorities confirmed a strike on one of the ships. These are the first claimed attacks since the Iranian-backed Yemeni group announced a blockade on Saudi Arabia.
summary_public: The Saudi authorities confirmed a strike on one of the ships. These are the first claimed attacks since the Iranian-backed Yemeni group announced a blockade on Saudi Arabia.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian-backed Yemeni group announced a blockade on Saudi Arabia.

SA.label: negative
SA.evidence: Strikes on 2 Saudi Oil Tankers in Red Sea
